name: azkari
description: أذكاري — Islamic PWA: morning/evening adhkar, full Quran, tasbeeh, prayer times. Packaged to Android & iOS via Capacitor.

scripts.add:android: npm run build:www && cap add android
scripts.add:ios: npm run build:www && cap add ios
scripts.run:android: npm run sync && cap run android
scripts.run:ios: npm run sync && cap run ios
